name: Sweet Green Tomato Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 premade pie crust recipe for a 9 inch pie, chilled
2 tablespoons butter, chilled and cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. On a lightly floured surface, roll out the pie dough into a circle about 12 inches in diameter. The edges will be ragged; this is fine as they will be folded in later.
3. Place the dough in a 9-inch pie plate and chill.
4. Cut the green tomatoes into thin slices and place them in a large mixing bowl. Add raisins, lemon peel, juice, and vinegar. Stir and set aside.
5. Mix together sugar, pecans, flour, salt, cinnamon, and ginger until well combined.
6. Sprinkle 2 tablespoons of this mixture over the chilled pie crust.
7. Add the remaining sugar-pecan mixture to the tomato slices and toss to coat evenly.
8. Scrape the tomato filling into the pie crust and dot with pieces of chilled butter.
9. Fold the overhang of pastry into the center over the filling.
10. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 15 minutes, then reduce heat to 325°F (165°C) and bake for an additional 45 minutes or until bubbly and golden brown.
11. Let the pie cool on a wire rack before cutting. Dust the top with powdered sugar for decoration.
